description: NinjaTrader 8 is open on the Windows desktop with the Control Center visible. Real daily OHLCV data for MSFT (Microsoft Corp) from January 2023 to December 2024 is available. Configure a specialized chart for swing trading analysis for 'MSFT' using a Kagi Bar Type with a Reversal amount of 3 points on a Daily timeframe. Add a 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator overlaid on the price panel and a Stochastics indicator (D=3, K=14, Smooth=3) in a separate panel below the chart. Save the workspace to persist your configuration. Login credentials (if needed): Docker / GymAnything123!
